# Resume Generator App

> A native desktop app for building polished resumes with live PDF preview, template gallery, and inline editing. Built with Wails (Go backend) + React/TypeScript/Tailwind CSS. Features background pre-generation for instant template switching, full inline resume editing with real-time validation, drag-and-drop file handling, dark/light mode, and export to PDF, DOCX, HTML, and LaTeX. Includes the full resume-generator CLI as a fallback.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/urmzd/resume-generator-app/blob/main/README.md): Installation, usage, features, and architecture
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/urmzd/resume-generator-app/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Architecture and development guide

## API / Key Files

- [main.go](https://github.com/urmzd/resume-generator-app/blob/main/main.go): Entry point (Wails GUI or CLI fallback)
- [app.go](https://github.com/urmzd/resume-generator-app/blob/main/app.go): Go backend with Wails-bound methods
- [frontend/src/pages/](https://github.com/urmzd/resume-generator-app/blob/main/frontend/src/pages/): DropPage, GalleryPage
- [frontend/src/containers/](https://github.com/urmzd/resume-generator-app/blob/main/frontend/src/containers/): GalleryContainer (PDF caching)
- [frontend/src/components/editor/](https://github.com/urmzd/resume-generator-app/blob/main/frontend/src/components/editor/): Inline resume field editors
- [frontend/src/hooks/](https://github.com/urmzd/resume-generator-app/blob/main/frontend/src/hooks/): useResumeEditor hook
- [wails.json](https://github.com/urmzd/resume-generator-app/blob/main/wails.json): Wails project configuration

## Optional

- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/urmzd/resume-generator-app/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to contribute
- [Skill](https://github.com/urmzd/resume-generator-app/blob/main/skills/resume-generator-app/SKILL.md): Agent skill
